builds.name: AI Decision Intelligence — 25 blocks + adi-bundle.js
builds.notes: Generated with esbuild from monorepo ES-module source; ADI-24 node:crypto replaced with Web Crypto in browser build

builds.name: Data Acquisition Layer root blocks
builds.notes: DAL = Data Acquisition Layer (audit 2026-07-21). Source: 25 IIFE blocks in infinicus-platform/layers/data-acquisition/blocks/, all tests passing. Includes dal-to-bo.ts completion; excludes cl-feedback.ts.

builds.name: Database Stage 2D — Business Intelligence schema
builds.notes: Frozen Stage 2C migration = 0036; first Stage 2D migration = 0037 (verified, not guessed). Persistence/repository work only — distinct from completed browser BI root blocks (BUILD-02).

builds.name: Platform assembly — all layers wired and validated
builds.notes: Adds platform/platform-bootstrap.js (window.INFINICUS.PLATFORM) + one index.html script tag (2 insertions, 0 deletions). Does not modify any completed layer, bundle, or the 6 placeholder handoff-contract files; does not touch migrations 0001-0049. Discovered and documented (not fixed, out of scope) two pre-existing defects unrelated to BUILD-10: digital-twin/dt-bundle.js header-comment syntax error (predates this build, git blame 750af3d), and 18 placeholder monorepo packages missing the vitest devDependency their test script requires.

builds.name: Governed MVP Decision Pipeline
builds.notes: Superseded by CLAUDE-MASTER-EXECUTION-INSTRUCTIONS.md (required route: BUILD-10 -> BUILD-12 -> ... -> BUILD-30, BUILD-11 explicitly excluded: 'BUILD-11 is superseded... never execute it'). Kept for history only per user decision 2026-07-22. Never marked ready; never implemented.

builds.notes: Dependency: BUILD-09 (Stage 2D, completed) per docs/architecture/PERSISTENCE-STAGE-MAP.md - independent of BUILD-10/BUILD-11 browser track. Frozen migration baseline after this build: 0001-0062.

builds.name: Database Stage 2F — Simulation persistence
builds.notes: Dependency: BUILD-12 (Stage 2E, completed). Frozen migration baseline after this build: 0001-0076.

builds.name: Database Stage 2G — AI Decision Intelligence persistence
builds.notes: Dependency: BUILD-13 (Stage 2F, completed). Frozen migration baseline after this build: 0001-0091.

builds.notes: Dependency: BUILD-14 (Stage 2G, completed). Frozen migration baseline after this build: 0001-0106.

builds.name: Database Stage 2I — Outcome Monitoring persistence
builds.notes: Dependency: BUILD-15 (Stage 2H, completed). Frozen migration baseline after this build: 0001-0121.

builds.name: Database Stage 2J — Continuous Learning persistence
builds.notes: Dependency: BUILD-16 (Stage 2I, completed). Frozen migration baseline after this build: 0001-0136. Completes the Stage 1-2J persistence route.

builds.name: Authentication and authorization
builds.notes: Dependency: BUILD-17 (completed). Built on the pre-existing Stage 1 tenancy/identity/audit schema (migrations 0003/0004/0006/0007/0011) plus one new seed migration (0137). Frozen migration baseline after this build: 0001-0137.

builds.name: Onboarding
builds.notes: Dependency: BUILD-18 (completed). Built on the pre-existing tenancy/platform/identity schema plus one new onboarding schema (migrations 0138-0141, one table). Frozen migration baseline after this build: 0001-0141.

builds.name: Customer decision workflows
builds.notes: Dependency: BUILD-19 (completed). Built packages/workflow orchestrating the existing BI/DT/SIM/ADI/ABA/OM repositories, plus the first real UI (Next.js 15, apps/web) per explicit user confirmation. No migrations added — six additive read methods on existing repositories only. Frozen migration baseline after this build: 0001-0141 (unchanged from BUILD-19).

builds.name: API layer
builds.notes: Dependency: BUILD-20 (completed). Built apps/api as a real Fastify 5 HTTP application governing AuthenticationService/AuthorizationService/OnboardingService/DecisionWorkflowService (versioned routes, schema validation, auth, tenant-context authorization, permission gates, idempotency, pagination, correlation IDs, controlled errors, rate limits, audit logging, OpenAPI docs). New api schema/table for HTTP-layer idempotency (migrations 0142-0145). packages/configuration and packages/observability rewritten from stubs into real implementations. Frozen migration baseline after this build: 0001-0145.

builds.name: Production database readiness
builds.notes: Dependency: BUILD-21 (completed). Delivered hardened connection pooling, migration advisory locking, a GET /v1/ready readiness endpoint, and a full backup/restore/PITR/retention/tenant-export toolchain under infrastructure/database/scripts/ (8 scripts), all live-tested including a genuine WAL-archiving point-in-time-recovery drill. Zero migrations added.

builds.name: Deployment
builds.notes: Dependency: BUILD-22 (completed). Delivered release versioning, deployment audit (new platform.deployment_events table + repository), an immutable Dockerfile for apps/api, a migration gate, health/smoke checks, a genuinely enforced promotion gate (staging requires test success, production requires staging success, checked by code), rollback procedure, and a CI workflow (.github/workflows/ci.yml) with real build+test+image jobs. Discovered main branch hosts an unrelated legacy site; CI scoped away from it. Fixed a pre-existing gap (no scripted app-role grants) and a Turborepo strict-envMode false-green bug along the way. One new migration (0146).

builds.name: Secrets management
builds.notes: Dependency: BUILD-23 (completed). Delivered a verified secret inventory (packages/configuration/src/secrets.ts), a fail-closed production-credential guard, a SecretProvider abstraction (EnvSecretProvider), default log redaction (packages/observability) plus free-text secret scrubbing, a rotation/expiration audit trail (platform.secret_rotation_events, migration 0147) with a live-tested rotate-db-credential.sh enforcing Postgres's VALID UNTIL, and a CI-wired browser-secret-prevention scan. Corrected a stale .env.example (6 fictitious env vars removed). One migration added (0147).

builds.name: Observability
builds.notes: Dependency: BUILD-24 (completed). Delivered error tracking (ErrorTracker, observability.error_events, wired into apps/api's error handler), lightweight in-process tracing (startSpan()), job/outbox monitoring (getOutboxBacklog()), a platform:admin-gated GET /v1/metrics dashboards-data endpoint, and alerting (observability.alert_events, observability-audit.cjs). Found and fixed a recurrence of BUILD-19's nil-UUID/empty-string session-variable bug in new repository code. One migration added (0148).

builds.name: Security and privacy
builds.notes: Dependency: BUILD-25 (completed). Delivered a threat model, dependency scanning (CI-wired allowlist script), SAST (eslint-plugin-security), a real DAST scan, live rate-limit/injection-resistance tests, security headers (@fastify/helmet), bounded request payloads, an explicit CSRF/XSS/SQLi assessment, and a genuine right-to-erasure capability (delete-tenant-data.mjs, platform.data_deletion_events). Found and fixed two genuine bugs via live testing: errorHandler.ts silently redacting legitimate 4xx errors to 500, and a cross-tenant data-safety defect in the deletion script's first draft. One migration added (0149).

builds.name: Performance
builds.notes: Dependency: BUILD-26 (completed). Delivered a live load-test tool (load-test.mjs) with real p50/p95/p99/throughput measurements, live database/Simulation/ADI concurrency tests, outbox-throughput measurement, a large-tenant test, connection-pool resilience testing, and a capacity plan/SLO doc grounded in real numbers. Found and fixed three genuine defects via live testing: (1) no application code anywhere calls the outbox emit_* SQL functions, a real cross-cutting wiring gap; (2) export-tenant.sh (BUILD-22) and delete-tenant-data.mjs (BUILD-26) only ever set app.tenant_id, silently producing incomplete exports/erasures for the ~300 of 442 tenant-scoped tables whose RLS also requires app.workspace_id — fixed to loop per-workspace; (3) delete-tenant-data.mjs crashed outright on tenants with real audit-trail history in the ~210 append-only (forbid_mutation-triggered) tables across every domain — fixed to skip and honestly report retained tables instead. No migrations added.

builds.name: Billing
builds.notes: Dependency BUILD-27 completed. Readied per explicit user instruction to continue through all builds to BUILD-30 without per-build check-ins.

builds.name: Incident response
builds.notes: Blocked on BUILD-28 completion.

builds.name: Launch readiness
builds.notes: Blocked on BUILD-29 completion. Final build in the BUILD-10-30 master roadmap.
